/usr/bin/c++ -O2 CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/http/httprequest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/http/httpresponse.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/net/acceptor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/net/channel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/net/epoller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/net/eventloop.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/net/eventloopthread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/net/eventloopthreadpool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/server/server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/server/tcpconnection.cpp.o -o bin/server  -lpthread
